title: Fearless And Fabulous Women Of Hove
description: One of the first women to wear a police uniform, a champion of animal rights, a mental health pioneer, a landmark women's hospital, the creator of The Wombles and many, many more! Join Louise Peskett, author of "The Fearless and the Fabulous, a Journey through Brighton and Hove’s Women’s History", on an easy and fun stroll to discover the amazing stories of some of the intriguing, adventurous, fantastic, outrageous, and scandalously little known female characters of the city's past. Expect to be surprised and inspired! Accessible route.

venue.name: MEET: Outside The Garden Café
venue.address: St Ann's Well Gardens, Summerhill Avenue, East Sussex
